summary: Backend testing for manufactured products stock features - All 10 tests passed. Verified: 1) GET /api/manufactured-products returns total_produced, transferred_quantity, remaining_quantity fields, 2) POST /api/manufactured-products/{id}/add-stock endpoint works correctly, 3) Stock and total_produced are updated after add-stock, 4) transferred_quantity increases when product is transferred to branch
critical_code_review_comments: Code review passed: add-stock endpoint correctly increments both quantity and total_produced
Code review passed: GET /api/manufactured-products correctly adds total_produced, transferred_quantity, remaining_quantity fields
Code review passed: Transfer to branch correctly increments transferred_quantity via $inc operator
Code review passed: add-stock validates quantity > 0 and returns 404 for invalid product ID
Code review passed: add-stock creates inventory_movements record for audit trail
seed_data_creation: Used existing manufactured products and branches for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manufactured products stock features verified. Key endpoints: GET /api/manufactured-products (returns stats fields), POST /api/manufactured-products/{id}/add-stock?quantity=N (manual stock increase), POST /api/warehouse-transfers (transfer to branch increases transferred_quantity). All features working correctly.

tests_performed.details: Products include total_produced, transferred_quantity, remaining_quantity fields
add-stock endpoint successfully increases product quantity

tests_performed.feature: Stock and total_produced updated after add-stock
tests_performed.details: Both quantity and total_produced correctly incremented after add-stock
Returns 400 for zero or negative quantity
transferred_quantity correctly incremented when product transferred to branch
remaining_quantity equals quantity for all products
Inventory movement record created with type 'manual_stock_add'
